home.metaDescription: SpexCrafters connects optical buyers with verified manufacturers and suppliers worldwide — lenses, frames, machinery, and services.

hero.title: The optical industry, calibrated.
hero.subtitle: Source lenses, frames, machinery, and services from verified manufacturers worldwide — with specifications you can trust.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join the global B2B optical marketplace.
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. Paste is allowed.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Follow it to activate your account.
checkEmail.resent: If an unverified account exists for {email}, a new verification email is on its way.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.successBody: Your email address is confirmed. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing its token. Request a new email below.
verifyEmail.resendAccepted: If an unverified account exists for this address, a new verification email is on its way.

validation.displayNameTooLong: Names can be at most 120 characters.
validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address, like name@company.com.
validation.emailTooLong: Email addresses can be at most 254 characters.
validation.passwordTooShort: Passwords must be at least 12 characters.
validation.passwordTooLong: Passwords can be at most 128 characters.

serverErrors.conflict: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
serverErrors.authentication-failed: The email or password is incorrect.
serverErrors.email-not-verified: Your email address is not verified yet. Check your inbox for the verification link.
serverErrors.token-gone: This verification link has expired or was already used.
serverErrors.validation-failed: Some fields need attention. Review the messages below.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
serverErrors.unexpected: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.

buyer.dashboardIntro: Your RFQs, quotations, and messages will appear here.

organizationsCard.title: Organizations
organizationsCard.body: Create an organization or manage the teams you belong to.

list.title: Your organizations
list.intro: Organizations you belong to on SpexCrafters.

empty.title: No organizations yet
empty.body: Create an organization to work with your team on RFQs, quotations, and supplier relationships.

list.loadError: We could not load your organizations. Try again shortly.

create.title: Create an organization
create.subtitle: Set up a shared workspace for your company. You become its first owner.
create.nameHint: The legal or trading name your partners will see.
create.countryHint: Two-letter country code, like DE or CN.

notFound.title: Organization not found
notFound.body: This organization does not exist, or you do not have access to it.

workspace.loadError: We could not load this organization. Try again shortly.

profile.title: Organization settings
profile.countryHint: Two-letter country code, like DE or CN.

validation.nameTooShort: Organization names must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nameTooLong: Organization names can be at most 120 characters.
validation.countryInvalid: Enter a two-letter country code, like DE.
validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address, like name@company.com.
validation.emailTooLong: Email addresses can be at most 254 characters.

serverErrors.unauthenticated: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
serverErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
serverErrors.authorization: You do not have permission to do that.
serverErrors.not-found: This organization does not exist, or you do not have access to it.
serverErrors.last-owner: An organization must keep at least one owner. Promote another member to owner first.
serverErrors.duplicate-membership: This person is already a member of the organization.
serverErrors.duplicate-invitation: A pending invitation for this email already exists.
serverErrors.conflict: This organization changed while you were editing. Reload the page and try again.
serverErrors.version-conflict: This organization changed while you were editing. Reload the page and try again.
serverErrors.token-gone: This invitation is no longer valid.
serverErrors.validation-failed: Some fields need attention. Review the messages below.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
serverErrors.unexpected: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.

accept.title: Organization invitation
accept.successBody: You are now a member of {org}.
accept.errorTitle: We could not accept this invitation
accept.missingToken: This invitation link is missing its token. Ask your organization to send a new invitation.
accept.expired: This invitation has expired or was already used. Ask your organization to send a new one.
accept.identityMismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Sign in with the invited email, then open the link again.
accept.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this organization.
accept.genericError: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.

unexpected.title: Something went wrong
unexpected.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
